user_query:
Run an offline Polymarket analysis and paper-trading simulation using only the provided input files and write two artifacts:
- output/report.txt: a concise Italian report that includes all required sections described below
- output/metrics.json: a strict JSON with metrics described below

Data and constraints:
1) Read these files under input/ (do not make any network calls):
- input/markets.json: list of market objects with fields: id, title, volume_eur, delta_prob_24h, closes_at (ISO8601), current_prob
- input/llm_costs.yaml: fields: openai_price_eur_per_1k, anthropic_price_eur_per_1k
- input/budget.yaml: fields: weekly_budget_eur, current_week_spend_eur, as_of_iso
- input/cycle_history.json: array of the last two cycles with fields: llm_cost_eur, simulated_return_eur

2) Pre-filter rules (deterministic, no LLM): from input/markets.json keep only markets where:
- volume_eur >= 2000
- abs(delta_prob_24h) >= 0.02
- closes_at is more than 24 hours after as_of_iso (from input/budget.yaml)
Then select up to 5 markets by descending volume. Call these the "selected markets".

3) Trading simulation (max 3 positions):
- Capital is 50€
- Open long YES positions only on selected markets with positive delta_prob_24h
- If more than 3 positives, choose the top-3 by volume_eur
- Invest equal weight per position (no leverage). Compute stake_per_position_eur = 50 / positions_opened, round to 2 decimals. It’s fine to leave a small amount of capital unused due to rounding
- Compute position P&L per market as: round(delta_prob_24h * stake_per_position_eur, 2). Then total pnl_eur = sum of position P&Ls rounded to 2 decimals. Also compute pnl_pct = round((pnl_eur / 50) * 100, 2)

4) LLM accounting (deterministic):
- openai_tokens = 50 * markets_observed + 25 * markets_selected_count
- anthropic_tokens = 200 + 10 * markets_selected_count
- anthropic_calls = 1 (exactly once)
- openai_cost_eur = round((openai_tokens / 1000.0) * openai_price_eur_per_1k, 4)
- anthropic_cost_eur = round((anthropic_tokens / 1000.0) * anthropic_price_eur_per_1k, 4)
- total_cost_eur = round(openai_cost_eur + anthropic_cost_eur, 4)

5) Budget gate:
- allowable_run_eur = max(0, weekly_budget_eur - current_week_spend_eur) from input/budget.yaml
- If total_cost_eur > allowable_run_eur set shutdown=true, else false

6) Complexity control:
- Look at the last two entries in input/cycle_history.json. If both have llm_cost_eur > simulated_return_eur, set complexity_reduced=true and include a prudent note about reducing complexity in the report. Otherwise set complexity_reduced=false

7) Required outputs:
- output/report.txt (in Italian, readable in <2 minutes) must include these labeled sections so they can be parsed:
  a) "Numero di mercati osservati: X"
  b) "Mercati selezionati: Y" (also name at least the selected market titles)
  c) "Risultato della simulazione: {pnl_pct}% e €{pnl_eur}"
  d) "Costi LLM dettagliati" with lines for OpenAI (tokens and €), Anthropic (tokens and €), and Totale (€)
  e) "Risultato netto simulato" = €(pnl_eur - total_cost_eur) rounded to 2 decimals
  f) A prudent comment that mentions whether complexity has been reduced when applicable
  g) "Mini-riassunto" followed by exactly 2 non-empty lines summarizing the outcome

- output/metrics.json must be a single JSON object with at least the following keys and exact types/rounding:
  {
    "markets_observed": int,
    "markets_selected_count": int,
    "markets_selected_ids": [string,...],
    "positions_opened": int,
    "positions_ids": [string,...],
    "capital_eur": 50,
    "stake_per_position_eur": number rounded to 2 decimals,
    "pnl_eur": number rounded to 2 decimals,
    "pnl_pct": number rounded to 2 decimals,
    "llm": {
      "openai_tokens": int,
      "openai_cost_eur": number rounded to 4 decimals,
      "anthropic_tokens": int,
      "anthropic_cost_eur": number rounded to 4 decimals,
      "total_cost_eur": number rounded to 4 decimals,
      "anthropic_calls": 1
    },
    "budget": {
      "weekly_budget_eur": number,
      "current_week_spend_eur": number,
      "allowable_run_eur": number,
      "shutdown": boolean
    },
    "complexity_reduced": boolean,
    "mini_summary": [string, string]
  }

Important:
- Do not access the internet; treat input/ files as the entire dataset
- Use only the relative paths shown
- Ensure the report is in Italian and includes all labeled sections verbatim so it can be automatically checked
